$comment: Per-tournament Discord webhook fan-out. Tim populates with real webhook URLs (Server settings -> Integrations -> Webhooks). Multi-channel fan-out: list more than one URL to fire into multiple channels at once. Webhook URLs are secrets in their own right -- treat this file as sensitive when deploying. Set `enabled: false` to pause the adapter without removing config.

wc26.$comment: Replace with real webhook URLs from the Tournamental guild's #goals + #news + #recap channels.

fifa-wc-2022.$comment: Demo tournament for the AR-FR replay. Aim a webhook at #demos in the dev guild.

default.$comment: Fallback webhook list for tournaments not listed above. If empty, fan-out skips Discord for unmapped tournaments (the adapter logs a warn).
